label: System Design Interview Simulator
description: Generates production-grade system design interview discussions, tradeoffs, and architecture evaluations.
prompt_template:
[SYSTEM ROLE]
Act as a senior distributed systems interviewer at a top-tier technology company.

[OBJECTIVE]
Conduct a detailed system design analysis based on the product requirements below.

[SYSTEM TO DESIGN]
{system_name}

[SCALE REQUIREMENTS]
{scale_requirements}

[FEATURE REQUIREMENTS]
{feature_scope}

[EXECUTION PRIMITIVES]
1. Design high-level and low-level architecture.
2. Explain database, cache, queue, and storage choices.
3. Discuss scaling bottlenecks and tradeoffs.
4. Evaluate reliability, consistency, and fault tolerance.

[SYSTEM DESIGN OUTPUT]:

fields.label: System / Product
fields.placeholder: e.g., URL shortener, YouTube, WhatsApp, Uber

fields.label: Scale Requirements
fields.placeholder: Describe DAUs, requests/sec, storage growth, global regions...

fields.label: Feature Scope
fields.placeholder: Describe messaging, search, notifications, feeds, uploads...
